_meta.description: Project-level configuration for Vibe template features. Checked in to git so team members share the same settings.
_meta.migrationNote: This file replaces .claude/project-config.json. Vibe uses a declarative permission model instead of hook-based configuration.

reviewSystem.description: Controls automated PR review skills behavior.
reviewSystem.note: In Vibe, this is checked by review skills on first invocation, not by a SessionStart hook. Users must invoke a review skill at least once to be prompted. See .vibe/skills/AGENTS.md for the catch-22 discussion.

permissions.description: Vibe uses declarative permissions.json instead of Claude's allowlist + hooks model.

mcpServers.description: MCP server integration for live external resources (GitHub, docs, etc.). Vibe-unique feature not available in Claude.

localModels.description: Local model support for privacy/cost reduction. Vibe-unique feature.
